message.name: Map Description / Title
message.description: Used to show the map's title/description in the old WON interface.

skyname.name: environment map (cl_skyname)
skyname.description: Lets you choose what sky image you want.

WaveHeight.name: Default Wave Height
WaveHeight.description: Set the default wave height here (can be overridden by the properties in func_water).

MaxRange.name: Max viewable distance
MaxRange.description: Maximum distance the player can see in Hammer grid units; same as sv_zmax.

chaptertitle.name: Chapter Title Message
chaptertitle.description: Text displayed when entering the level.
chaptertitle.value: The game logo will be displayed after the map loads.

1.name: Yes
1.description: The level will start black and fade into normal light.

1.name: Yes, clear previous levels
1.description: All previous global triggers will be removed.

mapteams.name: Map Team List
mapteams.description: This will be copied into the mp_teamlist while your map is running if the server allows maps to override the team list.
